---
title: "About"
---

(Longer "about" exposition)

## Department Roles and Service
- Mathematics Minor Administrator
- Faculty Advisory Committee
- Undergraduate Course and Curriculum Committee
- Undergraduate Recruitment Committee
- Undergraduate Advising Committee
- Course Coordinator: MA 103 (liberal arts math) and MA 242 (multivariable calc)

## Education

- University of California, Santa Barbara -- Ph.D. in Mathematics, 2013
- Duke University -- B.S. in Mathematics, 2007

## Work History

- North Carolina State University -- Associate Teaching Professor -- 2020 - present
- Harvard University -- Preceptor -- 2017 - 2020
- University of California, Santa Barbara -- EAF Lecturer -- 2015 - 2013
- California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo -- Lecturer -- 2013 - 2015
